name: Allwinnertech Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Allwinnertech Technology Co.,Ltd., a fabless design company, provides smart application processor SoCs and analog ICs worldwide. Its product line includes multi-core application processors for smart devices and smart power management ICs. The company offers its products for the connected automotive application, smart hardware, smart home device, service robot, drone, virtual reality, tablet, Internet TV, automotive in-dash device, smart power management, and mobile connected device markets. Allwinnertech Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Zhuhai, China.
